name: CORN Star Ring GL360 Black All-in-One Liquid CPU Cooler, 3*120mm ARGB Fans/PBT Material/Super Engine Pump/FEP polymer water cooling/Compatible LGA1700,1200,1151,1150,2066 and AM4, AM5 Socket
